concept: Precision wideband DC current/voltage sensing platform (optical and zero-flux hybrid) for HVDC converter stations, electrolyzer plants, and magnet systems
named_buyer_examples: VSC-HVDC integrators on US projects (Southern Spirit class)
electrolyzer/electrowinning plant EPCs
CN secondary equipment makers (license-out route)
painful_job: Multi-terminal DC protection needs millisecond fault discrimination but the measurement layer (wideband, high-accuracy DC current/voltage sensing) is supplied by a narrow incumbent set; protection algorithms are still re-derived paper-by-paper partly because sensing bandwidth/accuracy varies per project (L08-005/006/007); electrolysis plants lack the instrumentation to even see the ripple that degrades stacks (L11-016..021).
product: Sensor family: fiber-optic DC CTs and zero-flux hybrid transducers (kA-100 kA, DC-1 MHz), with a published accuracy/bandwidth test protocol; sold to converter and protection OEMs and plant EPCs; CN participation via licensed manufacture only (State Grid procurement is domestic).
frontier_vision: The measurement backbone for the DC century: every DC asset - HVDC bipole, electrolyzer hall, magnet string - instrumented with interoperable, protocol-published sensing that makes third-party protection and health analytics possible.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 lab prototype of optical DC CT with zero-flux reference; 2028 accuracy round-robin published with a national lab; 2029 one protection-OEM or EPC evaluation agreement - BINDING GATE, go/no-go paired with evidence of E-14-class third-party protection winning sockets (the merchant sensing layer exists only if that layer wins); CN license-out term sheet scoped 2029 (royalty upside only; not a market leg).
launch_2030_timing_thesis: US HVDC construction (Southern Spirit start 2029, in-service 2032, L08-041) and the PRC-029/IEEE-2800.2 compliance wave (L08-043/047) create measurement demand exactly in the 2030-2034 window; CN UHV tender cadence (L08-034) sustains a license-out channel.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: US: Southern Spirit and successor interregional VSC-HVDC procurements 2029-2032 (L08-041) plus IBR compliance retrofits; CN (license-royalty upside only, not a counted market leg - State Grid procurement is domestic-only): State Grid annual UHV equipment tender batches (L08-034 pattern) via a licensed CN manufacturer.
competition_outlook_2030: Hitachi Energy/ABB optical CTs, LEM/Hitec zero-flux, NR/XJ in-house sensing in CN (L08-034). Incumbents are strong; the wedge is DC-wideband performance plus an open qualification protocol for third-party protection (complementary to E-14-class relays). P4 map of Hitachi Energy/ABB optical-CT incumbency is required; the wedge must be the demonstrated combined accuracy+bandwidth+open-protocol result of the published round-robin, not an assertion.
timing_window_risk: Component-margin business with entrenched incumbents; if HVDC protection stays vertically bundled inside converter OEMs, merchant sensing stays niche.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (kill if no OEM/EPC evaluation converts to a project order by end-2033)
extreme_edge: Sensing-plus-protocol strategy: publish the DC measurement acceptance standard the industry lacks and own the reference implementations.
first_experiment: Optical + zero-flux hybrid 10 kA lab transducer; publish accuracy/bandwidth round-robin against commercial references, demonstrating DC-100 kHz fidelity adequate for traveling-wave protection (2027-28).
founder_fit_note: Strong transfer: fiber-optic current transducers, zero-flux hybrid sensing from DC to 1 MHz, and published accuracy test protocols are precision electromagnetics and instrumentation work at the core of the founder profile.
fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R2 FIX applied: HONESTY FLAG CHANGE primary_market US+CN -> US, china_beachhead true -> false (seed's own text: State Grid domestic-only, CN revenue 'license royalties at best' - same condition that downgraded C-12/C-21; CN license chapter retained in text, not counted toward CN quota); 2029 OEM/EPC evaluation agreement made binding with go/no-go paired to E-14-class third-party protection traction; P4 map of Hitachi Energy/ABB optical-CT incumbency required - wedge is the demonstrated combined accuracy+bandwidth+open-protocol round-robin result, not an assertion.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (FIX with flag change, N5/E7/C7/V6/T6): elegant measurement-layer complement to E-14 with a cheap decisive experiment; structurally dependent on third-party protection winning sockets. Honesty ruling applied: primary_market US, china_beachhead false.

concept: High-cycle, high-current charging-interface thermal subsystems: liquid-cooled (non-PFAS) megawatt cable/connector assemblies for MCS charging (US) and high-cycle swap-coupler + buffer-battery thermal modules for battery-swap infrastructure (CN)
named_buyer_examples: MCS charger OEMs serving port/mine fleets (US)
SPIC Qiyuan/CATL-ecosystem swap-station integrators (CN, via component design-in)
painful_job: Megawatt-class connectors/cables are shipping ahead of a mature thermal-engineering base - 2023-25 literature is still resolving cable-core and connector cooling (L14-019..022), and the best-tested coolant family (Novec) is discontinued; CN swap stations cycle 800 kWh packs through sub-7-minute swaps continuously (L10-031), a high-cycle contact + thermal duty with a fresh national standard but no specialist supply base (L10-046).
product: Thermally engineered interface hardware: water-glycol/low-GWP-cooled MCS cable-connector sets rated for 3,000 A duty with contact-resistance health sensing; swap-coupler thermal/contact modules and buffer-charging cold plates for swap stations; sold to charger and swap-equipment OEMs.
frontier_vision: Own the amp-meters-per-minute bottleneck of heavy electrification: whatever wins - conductive MCS or swap - the current must cross a connector that this company thermally masters.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 thermal test bench replicating IEC TS 63379 3,000 A duty with non-PFAS coolants; 2028 co-development agreement with one charger OEM (NREL emulator ecosystem, L10-049) - BINDING; CN leg BINDING GATE: P4 confirmation that CN swap-equipment component procurement is open to licensed outside suppliers before any CN investment (no eligible source documents CN conductive MW-charging demand); 2029 1e5-cycle contact endurance dataset; sequencing: port/mining applications (funded, L10-048) before trucking (MCS volume risk).
launch_2030_timing_thesis: MCS standard published Feb 2026 (L10-050) means volume deployments land 2029-2033; CN swap standardization (L10-045/046) scales the swap architecture in the same window; both need interface thermal hardware that neither EVSE nor connector incumbents have proven at duty.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: US: MCS charger rollouts for ports/trucking as EPA-funded equipment enters service life (L10-048) and NREL 20 MW emulator qualification work matures (L10-049); CN: swap-network expansion under national swap standards and SOE mining/marine programs (L10-031/040/046).
competition_outlook_2030: Staubli, Phoenix Contact, Huber+Suhner on cooled cables - P4 incumbent map REQUIRED, with the wedge proven by the 10,000-mate-cycle duty dataset, not asserted; CN connector majors and CATL in-house for swap. Wedge is duty-cycle-proven thermal data plus health sensing, not the connector geometry.
timing_window_risk: If MCS volumes slip and swap remains vertically integrated inside CATL/SPIC, merchant demand stays thin; B-14-class standards arbitrage may capture the interface layer first (coordinate, not compete).
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (kill if no OEM design-in by end-2032)
extreme_edge: Contact-health prognostics from thermal/electrical micro-signatures across the fleet - the swap network's insurance layer.
first_experiment: 3,000 A/1,250 V cooled cable-connector prototype on a thermal bench: demonstrate steady-state and 10-minute-cycle duty with water-glycol coolant, contact-resistance drift <10% over 10,000 mate cycles (2027-28).
founder_fit_note: Low direct fit: liquid-cooled megawatt cable/connector and swap-coupler hardware is thermo-mechanical contact engineering, with founder skills applying mainly to contact-resistance health sensing and telemetry.
fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R2 FIX applied: CN-leg binding gate added (P4 confirmation that CN swap-equipment component procurement is open to licensed outsiders); 2028 charger-OEM co-development made binding; P4 connector-major incumbent map (Staubli/Phoenix Contact/Huber+Suhner) with the 10,000-mate-cycle duty dataset as wedge proof; sequencing fixed - port/mining (funded) before trucking (MCS volume risk).
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (FIX, N6/E6/C6/V6/T6): genuine no-man's-land between EVSE OEMs and connector vendors; CN swap evidence country-specific (SPIC, GB/T 45926, CCS); no eligible source documents CN conductive MW-charging demand - CN leg gated.

concept: Merchant high-power RF vacuum windows and output couplers (brazed-ceramic assemblies with integrated diagnostics) for klystrons, gyrotrons, and solid-state RF chains
named_buyer_examples: US tube rebuilders and DOE/ARDAP-funded accelerator suppliers
gyrotron primes (Thales-class, EU/US programs)
IHEP/CEPC and CGN Dasheng ecosystems (CN, big-science procurement route)
painful_job: Output-coupler/window failure is named the most common failure mode in klystrons and vacuum electronic devices at high CW power, and fixes are still research-stage (L05-014); every tube maker and lab treats windows/couplers as an internal art, so operators carry unplanned downtime with no merchant qualified-spares supplier.
product: A qualified family of coaxial/waveguide RF windows and couplers (brazed ceramic, multipactor-suppressed coatings) with integrated arc/temperature diagnostics and a published acceptance protocol per IEC 60060-1:2025-referenced HV practice; sold as OEM components and lifetime-extension spares.
frontier_vision: The standard RF-vacuum interface company: as solid-state chains and next-generation tubes proliferate (fusion heating, colliders, industrial e-beam), every megawatt crosses a window this company makes or licensed.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 ceramic-metal joining and multipactor test capability at a university/lab partner; 2028 supply first evaluation windows into one NAMED rebuild program (ARDAP channel, L05-031/032) - BINDING GATE; 2029 lifetime dataset (thermal cycling + RF conditioning) published; P4: evidence on whether tube primes buy reliability-critical components merchant - if negative, re-scope to lab spares/aftermarket and re-size honestly; P4 also evaluates one beam-components portfolio company pairing F-09 with C-09/D-07 adjacency; CN big-science channel scoped through international procurement counsel.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: ITER gyrotron deliveries run to ~2029 (L05-029), fusion-heating and CEPC-class programs decide construction in the early 2030s (L05-012/013), and the EtO-replacement e-beam wave keeps industrial accelerators growing - all consuming windows/couplers from an artisanal supply base.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: US: DOE ARDAP/stewardship-funded accelerator industrialization and fusion-heating RF procurement post-2030 (L05-031/032); CN: CEPC construction decision and CGN Dasheng accelerator capacity expansion (L05-012/013, L05-035/038) reached via big-science procurement routes.
competition_outlook_2030: CPI/Thales/Canon in-house (L05-050, L05-029), Kyocera-class ceramics houses (judgment); CN: CAEP/CAS internal supply. Wedge: merchant qualification + diagnostics that in-house shops do not productize.
timing_window_risk: Small TAM and conservative buyers; if tube demand shrinks faster than SSPA-chain window demand grows, the niche stays sub-scale.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (kill if <2 paying lab/OEM customers by end-2032)
extreme_edge: Windows with built-in health telemetry - arc precursors and ceramic temperature - turning the most failure-prone RF part into the best-instrumented one.
first_experiment: Fabricate and RF-condition a 1 MW-class pillbox window prototype; demonstrate thermal-cycling life and multipactor margin versus a reference design, with integrated diagnostics (2028).
founder_fit_note: Low direct fit: brazed-ceramic vacuum windows and couplers are a materials/joining product, with founder skills applying peripherally to the integrated arc/temperature diagnostics and acceptance-test instrumentation.
fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R2 FIX applied: 2028 evaluation windows inside one named rebuild program (ARDAP channel) made the binding gate; P4 evidence requirement on prime merchant-buy behavior (if negative, re-scope to lab spares/aftermarket and re-size honestly); two-paying-customers-by-2032 kill retained; P4 evaluation of a beam-components portfolio company with C-09/D-07 adjacency added.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (FIX, N5/E6/C6/V5/T6): documented failure mode (L05-014), real qualification wedge, honest small-TAM admission; whether tube primes buy reliability-critical 'internal art' merchant is the killer question.

concept: Laser-ultrasonic non-contact inline weld-inspection subsystems: production-line laser-generated phased-array ultrasound for battery interconnect welds (CN) and pipeline/pressure-vessel welds (US)
named_buyer_examples: NDT service majors and pipeline operators (US, ISO 13588/ASTM E2700-governed work)
Chinese battery-equipment integrators serving CATL/BYD lines
painful_job: PAUT dominates pipeline weld inspection under standards on ~7-year revision cycles (L16-026/027) but remains couplant-based and offline for high-rate production; EV battery makers weld millions of Al-Cu joints on equipment bought at documented scale (L16-028) with no non-contact volumetric weld QC at line rate - laser-generated phased-array ultrasound exists only as research (L16-029).
product: An inline inspection head: fiber-laser ultrasound generation + interferometric/EMAT detection + real-time phased-array reconstruction, packaged as a bolt-on QC subsystem for welding equipment OEMs (battery lines) and crawler/scanner integrators (pipelines), with standards-mapped reporting.
frontier_vision: Non-contact volumetric weld QC at production rate everywhere ultrasound gel cannot go - batteries, hydrogen pipelines, shipyards - built on one laser-acoustic engine.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 lab demonstration on Al-Cu tab welds with destructive-test correlation; 2028 battery-equipment OEM co-development/design-in LOI - BINDING GATE (the CN demand bridge: inline volumetric QC demand is inferential, only the equipment channel is documented); US pipeline leg DE-WEIGHTED until a named operator/NDT-service evaluation exists by 2028 (standards-cycle timing is not a procurement trigger); 2029 standards engagement (ISO 13588 revision cycle) and speed/POD dataset; refresh L16-028 (2022-vintage buyer concentration) with a current filing before final scoring.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: Battery line speeds and dissimilar-joint content keep rising while weld QC remains sampling-based; pipeline codes revise on ~7-year cycles putting a new ISO 13588 edition plausibly in 2026-2031 (L16-027) - a 2030 entrant with a proven laser-PAUT head rides both.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: US: hydrogen/CO2 pipeline construction waves requiring higher-POD girth-weld inspection under updated ISO/ASTM editions (L16-026/027); CN: next battery-capacity buildout cycles and equipment-replacement waves at CATL/BYD-class lines (L16-028), accessed via equipment-OEM design-in.
competition_outlook_2030: Evident/Olympus, Zetec, Baker Hughes production NDT and Tecnar-class industrial laser-UT - P4 incumbent check REQUIRED; CN: SIUI-class NDT makers; in-line vision/resistance monitoring as the cheap substitute. Wedge: volumetric + non-contact at line rate.
timing_window_risk: Instrument-shaped wedge; must convert into an OEM-embedded subsystem or it stays a niche scanner business. POD-at-speed is the make-or-break metric.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (BINDING: kill if POD/speed target unmet by end-2029; kill if no OEM design-in by end-2032)
extreme_edge: Weld-quality data network across fleets of lines - defect signatures pooled into a process-improvement dataset OEMs cannot build alone.
first_experiment: Laser-UT scan of production Al-Cu tab welds at >=1 weld/s equivalent; correlate with teardown/pull tests to establish POD versus offline PAUT baseline (2027).
founder_fit_note: Strong transfer: interferometric/EMAT detection, laser-ultrasound signal chains, and real-time phased-array reconstruction combine founder sensors/instrumentation, electromagnetics, signal-processing, and numerical-analysis skills.
fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R2 FIX applied: CN demand bridge made binding (battery-equipment OEM co-development/design-in LOI by 2028); US pipeline leg de-weighted until a named operator/NDT-service evaluation exists by 2028; POD-at-speed end-2029 kill made binding; L16-028 (2022-vintage) refresh required before final scoring (rule 18); P4 incumbent check extended to Tecnar-class industrial laser-UT and Evident/Baker Hughes production NDT.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (FIX, N7/E7/C6/V6/T5): highest-novelty dual seed (first NDT play in the pool); physics risk on thin reflective Al-Cu at line rate honestly named; pipeline standards-cycle timing is too soft to carry demand.

concept: Magnetic-pulse welding (MPW) production machines for aluminum-copper battery interconnects and busbars - solid-state joining without heat-affected zones, positioned as the successor process to ultrasonic tab welding
named_buyer_examples: Chinese battery-equipment integrators serving CATL/BYD (the documented equipment buyers, L16-028)
pack/busbar line builders
painful_job: EV battery Al-Cu joining is a documented, buyer-concentrated Chinese equipment category (CATL+BYD >50% of one supplier's comparable purchases, L16-028); ultrasonic welding struggles with thick busbars and particle generation, while MPW research shows sound dissimilar Al-steel/Al-Cu joints inside defined weldability windows (L16-030/031) - but no productized, cycle-rated MPW machine serves battery lines.
product: A production MPW cell: long-life field-shaper coils (the consumable engineering moat), solid-state pulsed capacitor bank with per-shot energy control and coil-health monitoring, and weld-window process recipes for Al-Cu busbar/tab stacks; sold via co-development with CN battery-equipment integrators (design-in/licensing access path for a foreign founder).
frontier_vision: Solid-state joining as the default for dissimilar-metal electrification hardware - batteries, busbars, EV structures - with the coil-lifetime and weldability-window database as the durable asset.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 university-lab MPW rig: establish Al-Cu weldability windows and coil-life engineering (the known killer); BINDING coil-life gate: >=10,000 shots at spec by end-2028 - the entire engineering thesis; 2028 co-development agreement with one CN equipment integrator with the IP split CONTRACTUALIZED (founder retains pulsed-power hardware + process recipes; integrator sells the machine); 2028 cost-per-joint and line-rate model versus ultrasonic AND laser welding (laser is the real substitute); 2029 pilot cell on a busbar application; refresh L16-028 (2022) with a current filing before final scoring.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: EM forming/MPW has had a 15-year 'renaissance' without productization (L16-032) because coil life and process windows were unsolved; battery busbar thickness and throughput demands in the early 2030s create the first application where MPW's advantages are decisive rather than nice-to-have.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: CN: battery equipment replacement/expansion cycles at CATL/BYD-class plants and next-generation pack architectures (cell-to-pack busbars) procured through the integrator ecosystem documented in L16-028; secondary trigger: 800 V/high-current platforms thickening interconnects beyond comfortable ultrasonic range.
competition_outlook_2030: Jiaocheng Ultrasonic defending the incumbent process (L16-028), laser-welding equipment lines, EU MPW specialists (Bmax/PSTproducts-class, judgment names); Chinese fast-follow on MPW hardware is certain once windows are published - IP and coil-life know-how must stay ahead.
timing_window_risk: Process-substitution plays are slow; if ultrasonic + laser cover next-gen interconnects adequately, MPW stays niche. Enthusiasm-zone discipline: demand bridge is the documented equipment-buyer base, not the physics.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (BINDING: kill if coil life <10,000 shots at spec by end-2028; kill if no integrator agreement by end-2030)
extreme_edge: Per-shot electromagnetic process signature as built-in weld QC - every joint self-certifying.
first_experiment: Lab MPW rig: demonstrate Al-Cu busbar joints inside a mapped weldability window with >=10,000-shot coil life and pull/conductivity parity versus ultrasonic baseline (2027-28).
founder_fit_note: Pulsed capacitor-bank electronics, per-shot energy control, and field-shaper coil electromagnetics fit founder circuits and electromagnetics skills, but welding metallurgy, process-window development, and production-line integration are outside the profile.
fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R2 FIX applied: coil-life gate (>=10,000 shots at spec by end-2028) made binding; 2028 CN integrator co-development agreement now requires a contractualized IP split (founder retains pulsed power + recipes; integrator sells); 2028 cost-per-joint and line-rate model vs ultrasonic AND laser welding added (laser is the real substitute); L16-028 (2022) refresh required before final scoring.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (FIX, N7/E7/C6/V6/T5): genuinely non-obvious productization of a 15-year non-productized process; correctly identifies coil economics as blocker-turned-wedge; technology-push honestly gated (no battery maker has asked for MPW).

concept: Classification-certified DC power and protection stacks for battery-electric and battery-swap inland/coastal vessels (CCS Rules-native string protection, insulation monitoring, containerized-pack power interface)
named_buyer_examples: Inland-vessel shipyards and system integrators building Jining '6006'-class swap ships (L10-040)
non-CATL marine battery integrators needing CCS-rule-compliant electrics
painful_job: China's CCS Rules for Battery-Powered Ships (2025 edition, effective 2025-12-31, L10-045) impose new requirements - containerized mobile power source inspection, shore-based monitoring, online data exchange - on a fast-growing electric canal/coastal fleet (national-benchmark swap cargo ship, L10-040); shipyards must integrate DC protection, insulation monitoring, and swap-pack interfaces to class rules with no specialist merchant supplier.
product: A type-approved marine DC electrical stack: string-level protection and isolation, IMD, containerized-pack power/communication interface per CCS rules, and the shore-monitoring data gateway; sold to shipyards/integrators. Foreign-founder access: JV or licensed manufacturing with a CN marine-electric supplier, with class-society type approval (CCS, plus DNV for export variants) as the wedge a startup can own.
frontier_vision: The class-rule-native electrical backbone for electric shipping: as battery vessels spread beyond China, the same certified stack ports to DNV/ABS markets.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 map CCS 2025-edition electrical requirements into a reference architecture; 2028 partner selection (CN marine-electric JV/license) and begin CCS type-approval of the protection/IMD stack; 2029 first pilot vessel retrofit with an inland operator; DNV variant scoped for export hedge.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: CCS rules effective end-2025 create a compliance-driven refit and newbuild wave through the early 2030s; swap-ship architecture (15-minute swaps, L10-040) is scaling on the Grand Canal corridor while the specialist supply base is nascent.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: CN: CCS rule enforcement on newbuilds/refits from 2026 plus the next CCS edition (~2027-29 given the 2023-2025 cadence, L10-045) tightening monitoring requirements; canal/coastal electrification programs recognized as national transport benchmarks (L10-040) driving provincial procurement.
competition_outlook_2030: CATL-integrated electrics (dominant), CSSC-affiliated suppliers, European marine-electric houses (Danfoss Editron-class, judgment); domestic substitution is fast - the JV/licensing structure must concede manufacturing while retaining protection IP and type-approval ownership.
timing_window_risk: Access is the honest risk: if CATL bundles the full electrical stack with packs, the merchant socket closes; the wedge is non-CATL integrators and class-rule complexity.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (kill if no CCS type approval + pilot vessel by end-2031)
extreme_edge: Swap-pack electrical passporting: per-container health/interface certification data that classification societies can audit.
first_experiment: Build the string-protection + IMD + pack-interface stack against CCS 2025-edition requirements and pass a class-society design appraisal on paper + bench demonstration (2028).
founder_fit_note: String protection, insulation monitoring, and pack-interface electronics fit founder circuits and embedded skills, but classification-society type approval, shipyard integration, and the required CN joint-venture structure are outside the profile.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (PROMOTE, N6/E6/C7/V6/T7): best CN-primary seed of the wave - dated country-specific regulatory trigger (CCS Rules 2025 edition effective 2025-12-31, ~2-year revision cadence), national-benchmark vessel class, type-approval-dossier moat, honest JV structure (concede manufacturing, retain protection IP + type approval), $300k class-design-appraisal experiment, named CATL-bundling kill. P4: confirm non-CATL integrator/shipyard share; map CSSC-affiliated suppliers; scope DNV/ABS export hedge.

concept: Multi-stack DC distribution and per-stack management skids for 100+ MW alkaline electrolyzer parks (per-stack isolation, current balancing, hot-swap, stray-current control) - the layer between the rectifier and dozens of stacks
named_buyer_examples: EPCs and owners of multi-set parks: Sinopec Kuqa-class projects (L11-049)
China Energy Construction 125-set-tender project sites (L11-051)
LONGi/Peric-supplied park integrators (L11-050)
painful_job: Chinese hydrogen parks deploy electrolyzers in dozens of sets per site (24-set and 125-set tenders, L11-050/051) but run below nameplate (Kuqa at ~20-51% utilization episodes, L11-049); with renewable-following operation, per-stack current balancing, isolation for maintenance, and stray/shunt-current control (L11-012/013) are plant-level electrical problems no stack OEM owns - the rectifier vendor stops at the DC bus.
product: DC distribution skids between rectifier and stacks: per-stack disconnection/isolation with hot-swap, active current-share balancing across parallel stacks, stray-current mitigation, and per-stack telemetry; sold to EPCs/owners as balance-of-plant, deliberately complementary to rectifier retrofits (C-07-class) and stack OEMs.
frontier_vision: The 'string inverter moment' for hydrogen: parks stop being one giant series circuit and become managed arrays, lifting fleet utilization and stack life across the industry.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 model park-level electrical losses/imbalance with published Kuqa-type data; 2028 EPC retrofit-study partnership (access via engineering-services JV) - BINDING DEMAND GATE: measured park-level imbalance/stray-current losses must justify skid cost (>=3% utilization/specific-energy gain target) before any pilot build; 2029 pilot skid on a 4-stack sub-array at a partner site; P4: evidence that a licensed JV can win park-management retrofit scope at one named SOE park (no such tender exists yet - the audit-pressure trigger is inferential); boundary coordination with C-07 (rectifier) and F-23 (stack envelope) codified: one L11 power story, three sockets, at most two funded; explicitly monitor Sungrow/LONGi verticalization as the kill signal.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: China's park fleet built 2023-2027 hits mid-life underperformance reviews by 2030-2032 exactly as green-hydrogen offtake mandates tighten; retrofit money flows to utilization fixes, not new stacks (respecting the L11 overcapacity negative finding - this sells no stacks).
demand_trigger_2030_2034: CN: national green-hydrogen consumption mandates under the 15th FYP energy plans and SOE project performance audits forcing utilization retrofits at Kuqa-class parks (L11-049); successive CEC/Sinopec multi-set procurement rounds specifying park-level management (L11-050/051 pattern).
competition_outlook_2030: Sungrow Hydrogen and LONGi integrating park electrics vertically (the documented threat, L11-050/051); Siemens/ABB BOP packages for export projects. If Sungrow ships per-stack management by 2030, fold or license out.
timing_window_risk: Foreign access to SOE hydrogen parks is licensing/JV-only; the concept lives in the gap between rectifier vendors and stack OEMs, which either side can close.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (kill if Sungrow/LONGi ship equivalent park-management products before a 2031 pilot, or no EPC partner by end-2030)
extreme_edge: Park-level 'stack dispatch' - degradation-weighted current allocation across dozens of stacks, an optimization layer only an independent vendor can run across mixed OEM fleets.
first_experiment: Hardware-in-the-loop park model + 4-stack sub-array pilot demonstrating >=3% utilization/specific-energy improvement from per-stack balancing and isolation-enabled availability (2028-29).
founder_fit_note: Per-stack isolation control, current-share balancing, stray-current mitigation, and telemetry draw on founder circuits, controls, and electromagnetics skills, with plant-scale DC switchgear hardware and EPC delivery outside the profile.
fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R2 FIX applied: 2028 EPC retrofit-study partnership made the binding demand gate (measured park-level losses must justify skid cost; >=3% gain target); Sungrow/LONGi verticalization kill retained; P4 requirement added - evidence that a licensed JV can win park-management retrofit scope at one named SOE park; C-07/F-23 boundary coordination codified (one L11 power story, at most two funded).
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (FIX, N6/E7/C6/V6/T5): most elegant CN-primary framing ('string-inverter moment for hydrogen'); respects the L11 stack-overcapacity negative finding; demand mechanism (SOE audits forcing utilization retrofits) is inferential - gated.

concept: Inline-metrology plasma surface-treatment machines for PCB and advanced-packaging substrates: atmospheric/vacuum plasma cleaning with closed-loop surface-energy and residue metrology
named_buyer_examples: Shennan Circuits-class PCB manufacturers (documented plasma-cleaner tender, L01-114)
CN OSAT/panel-level-packaging lines
painful_job: Chinese PCB/packaging manufacturers already procure plasma cleaning machines by tender (L01-114) and the category is a durable product line globally (Nordson MARCH, L01-115), but treatment is run open-loop: no inline verification of surface energy/residue, so yield excursions surface downstream at bond/underfill - an acute problem as CN advanced packaging densifies.

concept: In-service coolant-health monitoring and side-stream conditioning skids for liquid-cooled AI-datacenter fleets (chemistry, particulates, bio-fouling, wear-metal telemetry with automated correction)

concept: PEM electrolyzer 'protective operating envelope' controllers with warranty-grade black-box logging: embedded plant hardware that shapes current/OCV stress and produces bankable degradation evidence
named_buyer_examples: US H2Hub project developers/financiers (L11-032)
PEM OEM deployments (Plug GenEco sites, L11-046)
CN park operators post-Kuqa (L11-049) via OEM design-in (LONGi/Peric channel)
painful_job: PEM warranties are written before the industry knows which stress (OCV rests, ripple amplitude, ramp rates) drives which degradation mode (L11-001/003/004/031); financiers price that ignorance into project debt (H2Hubs, L11-032) and Chinese parks demonstrably underperform under renewable-following operation (Kuqa, L11-049) - nobody sells hardware that both limits stress and proves compliance.
product: An embedded controller between plant control and stack: enforces manufacturer-agnostic protective envelopes (ramp shaping, OCV-rest management, ripple guards), logs tamper-evident stress histories, and issues warranty-compliance certificates; sold to OEMs and project financiers as the 'flight recorder + envelope protection' of stacks. Distinct from C-22 (offline degradation-truth benches) - this is the always-on plant device.
frontier_vision: Bankability hardware for electrochemical assets: every stack, battery, and fuel cell ships with an envelope-and-evidence layer that converts degradation science into financeable warranties.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 codify published stress-degradation maps into envelope algorithms; 2028 bench validation on a short stack with accelerated stress tests; BINDING 2029 GATE: one named H2Hub lender/financier technical requirement or a developer LOI referencing instrumented warranty evidence, PLUS one OEM design-in agreement (the demand mechanism is anticipatory - developers buy only if lenders force it); data-interface pre-agreement with C-22 (its benches calibrate the envelope maps this device enforces - no duplicate bench build); battery/fuel-cell warranty retarget hedge SCOPED (not asserted) by 2029.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: H2Hub Phase-2 construction and CN park retrofits both mature 2030-2033 with degradation warranties as the documented financing friction; the device is cheap relative to stack replacement risk.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: US: H2Hubs Phase 2 disbursement-to-construction transitions (L11-032) forcing lender technical requirements; CN: utilization audits at Kuqa-class parks and multi-set procurement rounds adding lifetime guarantees (L11-049/050/051).
competition_outlook_2030: Stack OEM in-house BMS-equivalents (Plug/Siemens/LONGi), plant-DCS vendors, C-22-class test companies extending into monitoring; feature-absorption is the main threat - the notarized evidence layer for financiers is the defensible part.
timing_window_risk: If hydrogen FIDs stay depressed (documented order-book contraction), volume never arrives; the device concept then retargets battery/fuel-cell assets (same physics of warranty).
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (kill if no OEM/financier adoption commitment by end-2032)
extreme_edge: Cross-fleet degradation actuarial tables - the Underwriters Laboratory of electrochemical asset life.
first_experiment: Short-stack A/B test: envelope-protected versus naive renewable-following profiles over 2,000 h, demonstrating measurable degradation-rate reduction and audit-grade logging (2028). BINDING: the A/B result must show a measurable degradation-rate reduction - the product's existence proof.
founder_fit_note: Strong transfer: the embedded envelope-enforcement controller, ramp/ripple stress shaping, and tamper-evident logging are founder embedded-systems, controls, and data-acquisition work, with stack electrochemistry degradation models as the main outside dependency.
fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R2 FIX applied: binding 2029 gate added (one named H2Hub lender/financier technical requirement or developer LOI referencing instrumented warranty evidence, plus one OEM design-in agreement); 2,000 h A/B experiment made the binding existence proof (measurable degradation-rate reduction); data-interface pre-agreement with C-22 (no duplicate bench build); battery/fuel-cell warranty retarget hedge scoped (not asserted) by 2029.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (FIX, N6/E7/C7/V7/T6): most intelligent new L11 seed - converts published stress-degradation science into bankability hardware with genuinely independent US (H2Hub lender exposure) and CN (Kuqa-class utilization audits) legs; demand mechanism is anticipatory - gated on lender forcing.

concept: Closed-loop UHV chamber conditioning and acceptance-certification systems for China's big-science vacuum supply chain: instrumented vacuum-firing/bakeout stations with measured hydrogen-outgassing endpoints, integrated rate-of-rise/leak/RGA acceptance metrology, and tamper-evident per-chamber certification - sold as equipment plus recurring calibration to the China-registered fabricators who alone may bid HEPS/CEPC-class chamber tenders.
named_buyer_examples: IHEP/CAS (HEPS storage-ring chamber tenders, China-registered-manufacturer-only rule - L07-045)
ASIPP/CAS (fusion facility procurement cadence - L01-037, L01-038)
China-registered vacuum-chamber fabricators qualified under IHEP tender rules (specific firms to be named in P4 from tender-award records)
painful_job: Every UHV chamber delivered to a Chinese big-science facility must clear hydrogen-outgassing and leak acceptance; the only validated route is a rigid, energy-intensive fixed recipe (250C/30h for >70,000x H2 reduction - L07-009; material dependence L07-008), run open-loop with negotiated per-project acceptance. Tender rules restrict bidding to China-registered manufacturers that are themselves the manufacturer of the offered product (L07-045; PRC-registration + manufacturer eligibility clause independently verified in the primary tender document at ccnta.cn on 2026-07-13 - ledger claim_supported repair assigned to the orchestrator), so domestic fabricators must build this process-and-metrology capability themselves. Market-structure context only, no import-constraint claim: INFICON FY2025 regional sales (Americas -12.4% to $156.4M; Asia-Pacific +19.2% to $168.6M - L07-053) show a mid-scale, regionally shifting metrology market, and APAC growth evidences CONTINUED import availability - the wedge is the tender rule plus the fabricators' process-capability gap, not a metrology import barrier.
product: A conditioning-and-acceptance island: (1) instrumented bakeout/vacuum-firing station with model-based hydrogen-depletion endpoint control that replaces the fixed 250C/30h recipe with a measured stop criterion; (2) integrated outgassing-rate (throughput and rate-of-rise), helium-leak, and RGA cleanliness metrology traceable to witness standards; (3) certification software producing per-chamber signed acceptance dossiers matching facility specs. Founder-controlled: endpoint models, calibrated reference standards, certification format. JV/licensed CN entity builds the furnace hardware.
frontier_vision: The 'certified vacuum outcome' layer for everyone who builds UHV/XHV hardware - accelerators, fusion, quantum cryostat supply chains, semiconductor chamber fabricators - where chambers ship with measured outgassing datasheets the way steel ships with mill certs; extreme end extends toward XHV acceptance (L07-002, L07-001).
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: publish hydrogen-depletion endpoint model and bench validation against the L07-009 benchmark; build instrumented bakeout bench ($300k decisive experiment). 2028: cooperative-agreement validation with one non-CN accelerator lab to establish credibility (complementary to, not competing with, the surviving A-05 US surface-engineering line); begin CN channel scouting and HK/CN licensed-entity design; freeze IP split (models/metrology retained, furnace hardware licensed); BINDING 2028 evidence gate: document that CN facilities impose vacuum-acceptance requirements on fabricators at delivery (tender technical annex, facility vacuum-acceptance spec, or fabricator quality requirement) - the buyer-existence proof that fabricators, not institutes, own conditioning/acceptance; no 2029 paid pilot without it. 2029: paid pilot with one China-registered chamber fabricator. BINDING P4 pre-promotion condition: re-date the 2021-vintage L07-045 anchor AND evidence >=2 additional CN chamber-class tenders (HEPS follow-on/CSNS/ASIPP-pattern) to establish multi-tender procurement cadence beyond CEPC; name a NIM-class CN metrology anchor for witness-standard traceability.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: Window opens, not closes, at 2030: China-manufacturer-only tender rules (L07-045, eligibility clause verified in the primary document) mean domestic fabricators need certified process capability exactly as the largest CN vacuum procurement wave (CEPC-class) is decided; the craft is process-and-metrology, which incumbent furnace makers and instrument vendors have not packaged, and which does not commoditize by 2030 because no volume market exists yet to attract them.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: NAMED TRIGGER: CEPC construction approval under China's 15th Five-Year Plan - IHEP is already running CEPC-specific high-efficiency klystron prototypes (L05-012, L05-013), evidencing a funded pre-construction program; approval converts to ~100 km of storage-ring/booster vacuum sections procured under China-registered-manufacturer rules through the 2030s. Secondary named cadence: HEPS-pattern follow-on/upgrade tenders (L07-045) and ASIPP fusion power/vacuum upgrade tenders (L01-037, L01-038 pattern).
competition_outlook_2030: SAES Getters (coating incumbent, IT - L07-037) constrained by the localization rule; INFICON-class Western metrology vendors sell gauges, not conditioning process control or certification dossiers (L07-053 retained as market-structure context only - imports remain available, APAC sales +19.2% FY2025); domestic furnace makers selling heat without certified vacuum outcomes; institute in-house benches (IHEP/ASIPP build their own, do not productize); component houses (Kurt J. Lesker-class catalogs, L07-036) sell parts not process. Main 2030 threat: a large CN fabricator internalizing the bench and a CAS institute publishing a free reference recipe.

Access risk: foreign founder cannot bid tenders directly - sells equipment/certification to eligible fabricators via licensed CN entity; margins mid; IP risk is bench absorption, countered by calibrated reference standards and model updates rather than a one-time transferable recipe.

concept: Merchant beam-exit windows, X-ray conversion-target assemblies, and target-interface subsystems - with foil-health monitoring interlocks and certified burst/thermal-margin datasheets - as the qualified consumables layer for China's expanding industrial e-beam/X-ray sterilization fleet and CNNC's centrally procured medical-isotope cyclotron centers.
named_buyer_examples: China Isotope & Radiation Corp / Atom Hi-Tech - centralized self-shielded cyclotron procurement for the named Haikou, Nanyang, Nanchong isotope centers (L05-036)
CGN Dasheng Accelerator Technology - active listed e-beam accelerator manufacturer/operator ecosystem (L05-035; contract figures pending text-extractable re-fetch)
CN sterilization service operators converting from EtO under ISO 11137-1:2025 (L05-042)
painful_job: Where the beam leaves the vacuum is the machine's most abused interface: thin-foil exit windows and X-ray conversion targets absorb concentrated heat flux, cycle thermally with every run, and take the machine down when they fail - the same interface class documented as 'among the most common issues' in high-power vacuum-electronic devices (L05-014). ISO 11137-1:2025 raised allowable e-beam energy 10->11 MeV and X-ray energy 5->7.5 MeV (L05-042) - a PERMISSIVE change: re-qualification demand arises only where operators choose to uprate for throughput, so uprating adoption is a 2028 evidence gate, not an assumed fleet-wide wave; operators meanwhile remain locked to OEM spares pricing and lead times. In China, an isotope-center network is being centrally procured (L05-036) and each center's cyclotrons consume target foils/windows continuously - with localization pressure against imported spares.
product: A cross-platform qualified family: (1) Ti-alloy foil exit-window assemblies with engineered cooling frames and statistically certified burst margins; (2) water-cooled Ta/W X-ray conversion-target assemblies for e-beam->X-ray sterilization mode at post-2025 energy limits; (3) cyclotron target-interface hardware (windows, cooling, transfer interfaces); (4) foil-health monitoring (IR temperature + rupture detection with <10 ms vacuum-protection interlock); (5) certified per-lot datasheets and a consumables replacement program. Founder retains foil-bonding/qualification test IP and monitoring electronics; a licensed CN JV manufactures consumables for CN buyers.
frontier_vision: The merchant 'beam-facing consumables' company for the irradiation economy - windows, converters, targets, and their health instrumentation across sterilization, isotope production, cargo scanning (Varex-class Linatron converters - L05-033), and FLASH-era machines where interface thermal loads only grow (UHDR context L05-023, L05-024).
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: failure-mode and patent map of window/target art; build 60 kW-class window/target test cell; decisive experiment ($350k). 2028: binding gate - one co-development/evaluation agreement with a named operator or OEM rebuild channel (CN side via licensed entity; US side via a sterilization contractor or ARDAP-ecosystem partner, L05-031); certified datasheet library started; P4-style verification of the CN medical-isotope plan primary text and re-extraction of L05-035/L05-028 figures; second BINDING 2028 evidence gate: named operators/OEMs actually uprating to 11 MeV/7.5 MeV under ISO 11137-1:2025 (else the ISO trigger de-weights to CN consumables + localization demand only); beam-time validation of radiation-driven foil degradation (embrittlement, blistering) via the co-development partner - the surrogate-flux experiment does not cover it. 2029: paid qualification order for spares on one installed machine class; contractualized JV IP split before any CN manufacturing.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: 2030 lands after early operators uprating to the permissive ISO 11137-1:2025 energy limits have created demand for third-party qualified assemblies but before OEM spares chains have re-tooled to the new limits - contingent on uprating adoption (2028 evidence gate: named uprating operators/OEMs, else the ISO trigger de-weights to CN consumables + localization demand only); in CN, the named isotope centers procured in 2024 (L05-036) reach routine operation around 2027-2029, so their consumables demand and localization pressure peak exactly in the 2030-2034 launch window.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: NAMED TRIGGER: the CNNC/China Isotope & Radiation centralized procurement cadence - follow-on cyclotron/isotope-center tenders after the 2024 three-center round (L05-036), under China's Medium-and-Long-Term Medical Isotope Development Plan (2021-2035; named policy, primary text to be fetched in P4 - not yet an atlas-verified citation). Parallel CN trigger: continued EtO-replacement/X-ray adoption in sterilization under ISO 11137-1:2025 (L05-042) served by CGN Dasheng-class capacity (L05-035) - the energy-limit change itself is PERMISSIVE; its trigger weight is contingent on the 2028 named-uprater evidence gate.
competition_outlook_2030: OEM in-house spares: IBA (L05-028 - identity-level; backlog claims unverified), L3-class, Varex internal targets (L05-033), CGN Dasheng in-house (L05-035); specialty merchant targetry houses (ARTMS/Comecer-class plus IBA's own target business) - PRE-PROMOTION BINDING P4 incumbency map for the cyclotron-target leg: if merchant targetry is already served, re-scope to the e-beam/X-ray window+converter leg where the merchant white space is more plausible; CNNC-ecosystem machine shops copying foil assemblies (domestic-substitution risk). The 'no merchant, certified, cross-platform supplier' claim is held as JUDGMENT pending that map. Startup wedge is the certified burst-statistics dossier + monitoring interlock + cross-platform qualification, none of which spares copies carry. Portfolio pre-agreement: G-02 joins the R2 beam-components portfolio evaluation (F-09/F-20, with C-09/D-07 adjacency) at P4 - at most one funded beam-components company.
timing_window_risk: Component-level pain is INFERRED from adjacent documented physics (L05-014) plus consumables logic - no atlas source yet documents window/target failure economics; this is the seed's honest gap and the 2028 co-development gate is binding. Access: consumables for SOE-adjacent buyers must be made in-country; foreign founder concedes manufacturing margin to a JV and holds qualification/monitoring IP - copying risk is real and priced (kill gate). Market size must be built bottom-up from fleet counts in P4; treat as a beachhead-sized wedge, not a large TAM claim.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034-12-31; interim kills: no operator/OEM co-development agreement by end-2028 -> stop; no paid qualification on an installed fleet by end-2030 -> fold to licensing the qualification/monitoring package.
extreme_edge: FLASH/UHDR-era interfaces - dose-rate regimes where even beam metrology is unresolved (L05-023, L05-024) and window thermal-shock margins become the machine-protection limit.
first_experiment: 2027-Q3: 60 kW-class beam-equivalent heat-flux test cell (scanned e-beam or calibrated surrogate flux) - foil window assembly surviving >=2,000 thermal cycles at 11 MeV-era flux with measured burst margin >=3x rated differential; Ta converter coupon thermal-cycling; rupture-detection interlock demonstrated <10 ms to isolation-valve trigger. VALIDITY LIMIT (declared): surrogate heat flux validates thermo-mechanics and interlock speed ONLY - it does NOT validate radiation-driven foil degradation (embrittlement, blistering); beam-time validation is bound into the 2028 co-development gate.
founder_fit_note: Low direct fit: titanium-foil exit windows and cooled conversion targets are thermo-mechanical/materials consumables, with founder skills applying mainly to the foil-health monitoring and interlock instrumentation.

gate_results.non_duplication_vs_survivors: Nearest survivors: C-09 (merchant modulator/drive-chain platform - shares CN demand anchors L05-035/036 as evidence overlap, not concept overlap: C-09 drives the beam, G-02 owns where the beam exits the vacuum) and F-09 (RF-vacuum windows/couplers sold INTO tube primes for the RF path - different physics [foil thermo-mechanics under particle-beam heat flux vs RF dielectric windows], different buyers [operators/isotope centers/OEM aftermarket vs VED primes], different economics [consumables vs qualified internals]). Merged C-10's dosimetry content is NOT reproduced: G-02's monitoring is machine-protection interlock, not dose metrology.

concept: DC-conversion acceptance and commissioning instrumentation: a portable measurement island (swept-impedance bus-stability analyzer, IT-network insulation/ground-fault characterization, hot-swap/inrush transient capture) plus standardized acceptance protocols and signed dossiers, for facilities converting legacy UPS power rooms to 240V/336V/+-400V/800VDC and for vendors qualifying DC shelves - the measurement layer of the DC transition, not another in-path power product.
named_buyer_examples: US: OCP-member hyperscalers' commissioning chains (Google/Meta/Microsoft Mount Diablo - L02-044) and NVIDIA-ecosystem shelf/system vendors qualifying 800VDC hardware (L02-043, L02-046)
CN: Alibaba-lineage HVDC operators and their integrators - Delta China 'Panama' architecture (L02-048), Shenzhen Autrans supplying Alibaba datacenters and East-Data-West-Computing parks (L02-049)
CN: SOE telecom/colocation power-system procurement channels (China Mobile/Telecom HVDC collective-procurement cadence - named channel, P4 to evidence with an eligible primary source)
painful_job: The DC transition is architecturally unconverged - NVIDIA 800V-to-12V vs Google +-400V transitional approaches, with SiC voltage-rating, LLC resonant-conversion, and isolation design named as core unresolved hurdles in Chinese engineering coverage (L02-054, verified content) and multiple PSU architectures being standardized in parallel at OCP (L02-044). Every converted hall is therefore a systems-integration experiment: source/load impedance interactions, ungrounded-bus insulation behavior, and hot-swap transients have no site-acceptance test regime (IEC 62477-1 covers converter safety, not site acceptance - L02-112; the SST/IEC 60076 mismatch shows how slowly DC standards adapt - L02-036). China's installed base makes this a retrofit problem: the conversion-base case rests on verified deployment anchors (Delta/Alibaba 'Panama' 240VDC deployments in Zhejiang/Jiangsu - L02-048; Autrans supplying Alibaba datacenters and East-Data-West-Computing parks - L02-049; ongoing architecture churn - L02-054), so the 2030-2034 work is converting existing UPS halls, not just new builds. The circulated '~12% HVDC vs 78% UPS (~2021)' penetration figure is UNVERIFIED (not in the verified L02-048 record; raw-ledger WebSearch synthesis only) and is NOT load-bearing - P4 must re-source an eligible CN installed-base/penetration figure before final scoring.
product: An acceptance island: (1) GaN-based perturbation injector + analyzer measuring source/load impedance overlap and stability margins on live 240-800VDC buses; (2) insulation/ground-fault characterization and leakage mapping for unearthed (IT) DC networks; (3) high-fidelity transient capture for hot-swap/inrush/protection-coordination validation; (4) automated test sequences producing signed acceptance dossiers mapped to IEC 62477-1 (L02-112) and OCP/GB frameworks. Sold as instrument + per-project protocol license; the accumulated cross-vendor test-sequence library and stability-margin dataset is the compounding moat.
frontier_vision: The acceptance-and-evidence layer for all DC electrification - datacenter halls first, then 1500VDC (OCP roadmap - L02-044), DC industrial parks, EV megawatt charging plazas, and shipboard/microgrid DC - the 'commissioning authority in a flight case' for a world that is re-learning DC engineering.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: method benchmarks published (impedance-criterion stability assessment on multi-vendor DC testbeds); OCP power-workstream participation; prototype injector/analyzer; decisive experiment ($300k, 2027-Q2). 2028: paid pilot audits - one US commissioning firm and one CN integrator via HK/CN licensed entity; begin cross-vendor sequence library. 2029: BINDING per-market gates, split - (US) no US frame agreement by end-2029 -> the US leg folds to niche lab tooling; (CN) no CN integrator frame agreement by end-2029 -> the CN leg downgrades to license-only with the honest flag change applied (F-06 precedent); plus P4 re-source of an eligible CN installed-base/penetration figure (the ~12%/78% figure is UNVERIFIED, not load-bearing) and evidence for the 8-12-year refresh-cycle inference; re-verify SOE procurement cadence.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: By 2030 the architecture war (800V vs +-400V vs legacy 240/336V) has produced a large heterogeneous installed base mid-conversion; acceptance instrumentation monetizes the heterogeneity itself, which persists precisely because standardization lags (L02-036, L02-112). Pre-2030 the market is too new (vendors self-certify their own first deployments); post-2034 OCP-standardized acceptance suites from instrument majors become the risk - hence the window and the kill gate.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: NAMED TRIGGERS: US - post-2027 scaling of NVIDIA's 800VDC Kyber/Rubin-Ultra production architecture (L02-043) and OCP Mount Diablo spec revisions (L02-044), each conversion/new hall requiring commissioning. CN - (a) refresh-cycle conversion of the legacy UPS-dominant installed base (verified deployment anchors L02-048/L02-049; the ~12%/78% penetration figure is UNVERIFIED and not load-bearing - P4 re-source of an eligible CN installed-base figure required; the 8-12-year power-system refresh cycle is labeled INFERENCE and must be evidenced in P4); (b) implementation programs under the April 2026 national AI-energy action plan, Guo-Neng-Fa-Ke-Ji [2026] No.34 (L14-036 - verified content only: high-efficiency cooling research areas and green-power direct connection; the trade-press '100% liquid-cooling mandate' is debunked and NOT relied on); (c) East-Data-West-Computing park expansion channels (L02-049). SOE telecom HVDC collective-procurement cadence named as channel, P4-verify.
competition_outlook_2030: Integrator self-certification (Delta - L02-048, Huawei-ecosystem, Autrans - L02-049); instrument majors (Keysight/Chroma/Hioki/Fluke) adding DC options without system-level acceptance protocols, and CN certification institutes (CQC/CEPREI-class) offering service-only testing - PRE-PROMOTION BINDING P4 competitor map covering both (instrument-major DC-acceptance roadmaps + CN institute service scope): the third-party-acceptance willingness thesis must survive it; Bender-class insulation-monitoring device vendors (devices, not commissioning toolchains); protection-product vendors bundling diagnostics (C-01-class units - which G-03 tests rather than competes with); component uncertainty in the CN chain (sole mainland NVIDIA-list supplier still without disclosed orders - L02-050) sustains third-party verification demand.
timing_window_risk: Datacenter-adjacency declared honestly: demand is deliberately anchored to retrofit/acceptance of the EXISTING installed base and per-project commissioning spend, not to incremental AI capex (the downturn-resistant slice, F-19 precedent); a total freeze of DC investment would still slow it - stated, not hidden. Core demand risk: operators may accept vendor self-certification instead of paying for third-party acceptance - the 2029 frame-agreement gate is binding. CN access: services/instrument sales via licensed entity; hardware is copyable, so the moat must be the validated methodology + sequence library + dossier credibility; margins on instrument plus per-project license; State-Grid-facing work is explicitly out of scope (commercial operators/integrators only), avoiding the F-06/C-12 domestic-only trap.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034-12-31; per-market 2029 downgrade gates (split, binding): no US frame agreement by end-2029 -> US folds to niche lab tooling; no CN integrator frame agreement by end-2029 -> CN downgrades to license-only with honest flag change (F-06 precedent); interim kills: no US commissioning design-in AND no CN integrator frame agreement by end-2031 -> kill; OCP publishes a complete acceptance-test standard implemented by entrenched instrument majors before 2031 -> fold to niche lab tooling or license the sequence library.
extreme_edge: 1500VDC-class acceptance (OCP next step - L02-044) and MW-scale hot-swap transient physics, where no commercial instrument today produces admissible stability evidence.
first_experiment: 2027-Q2: GaN perturbation injector + analyzer prototype on a 100 kW 800VDC testbed with deliberately mis-tuned LLC stages - predict instability from measured source/load impedance overlap and validate prediction against observed bus oscillation across >=20 configurations; hot-swap transient capture fidelity benchmarked against reference instrumentation. Testbed assumption (declared): the 100 kW 800VDC testbed is loaner/partner hardware (OCP-member or integrator lab); the $300k budget covers injector/analyzer build and test time, not testbed ownership.
founder_fit_note: Strong transfer: swept-impedance stability analysis, insulation/ground-fault characterization, high-fidelity transient capture, and automated signed test sequences form a portable test-and-measurement product at the center of founder instrumentation, circuits, and data-acquisition skills.
